introSection: Bavarian Beetle was a steel roller coaster located at Kings Island from April 29, 1972, to 1978. Before arriving at Kings Island, it operated at Coney Island from 1970 to September 6, 1971.
fullText:
Bavarian Beetle was a steel roller coaster located at Kings Island from April 29, 1972, to 1978. Before arriving at Kings Island, it operated at Coney Island from 1970 to September 6, 1971.



Blue track and red supports.
